text:
is a book by Newtype Editorial Department published by Kadokawa Shoten in 2005. It was bundled with the Monthly Newtype Magazine 2005 November issue. It is part of the tenth anniversary project of the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise.

Overview

The book is a collection of articles featured in the from Monthly Newtype April 1995 to December 2003.
